reasoning: Rockstar games are notorious for being delayed from their initially announced release windows. While Take-Two has reiterated a Fall 2025 release window, any delay from Fall 2025 would almost certainly push the release into 2026. Given the ambitious nature of the game and Rockstar's track record (GTA V, RDR2 were all significantly delayed), a delay to early 2026 is a very real possibility. However, Take-Two seems confident in the Fall 2025 window as of recent earnings reports, putting the current probability of a 2025 European release around 67%.
